name: Canary Marinade Solana ETF
summary: PART I . Summary Canary Marinade Solana ETF (the Trust) was organized as a Delaware statutory trust on June 6, 2025. The Trust continuously issues common shares representing fractional undivided beneficial interest in and ownership of the Trust (Shares). The Shares of the Trust are listed on The Nasdaq Stock Market, LLC (Nasdaq or the Exchange) under the ticker symbol SOLC.
